title: Usopp and Nami Counterattack
description: On pages 11–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is usopp and nami counterattack.
scene: The scene follows usopp and nami counterattack, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The other six, I can use freely at any time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These are horns, not coral!! And I'm not a "creature".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Excellent work... you have succeeded in capturing Shirahoshi!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Remember your brothers, living peacefully in the far north...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We know where to find them. We could go and kill them at any time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I'm sure such legendary corpses would fetch a high price!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that's what you want, then by all means continue to defy me!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: But I'd suggest you stop Sympa- thising with these humans and act like the monster you are!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... He was controlling the kraken by threatening the lives of its kin ....?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you were doing as that guy says to protect your family, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: You got little brothers back home? Or big brothers?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shishish!! Then let me help you keep them safe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Straw hat is coming for us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You idiots can't do a thing, Dogon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll teach that pirate to keep shouting about dried squid....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You will not reach our captain!!!

summary: Usopp and Nami Counterattack. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
